author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Plan: (1) Expand DEFAULT_ALLOWED_BASH with gh, cat, wc, head, tail, which, command, mktemp, sleep, find, sort, grep, rg, date, env, basename, dirname, realpath, stat, file, uname, id. (2) Write .crosslink/.active-issue sentinel file in session work/quick, read it in hook instead of spawning subprocess. Clear on session end.
